ksa_text: Conduct AI risk assessments across the system lifecycle, including risk identification, impact analysis, likelihood estimation, and documentation of proportionate mitigation measures for different risk categories.

Obligations for providers of general-purpose AI models
Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-020 (AI and Machine Learning/Task) scores 0.508 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.508) and is edge_case for the Data Product Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Data Product Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.508), and AI and Machine Learning handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI/ML competencies for Data Product Manager at manager level?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI/ML overlap appears in 15-40% of Data Product Manager postings depending on seniority. Core signals: 0. OOS signals: 0.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content without sufficient core signals is not market-supported for Data Product Manager. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content without sufficient core signals is not market-supported for Data Product Manager. Final decision: exclude.
